member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Entities.CryptoKey
member.summary: Represents a cryptographic key pair.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.DefaultAlgorithms
member.summary: Default algorithm configuration for the National Digital ID system. These algorithms are fixed and cannot be changed by users.

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.DefaultAlgorithms.Signature
member.summary: Default signature algorithm: KAZ-SIGN-256 (Security Level 5). This is the only signature algorithm used for National Digital ID.

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.DefaultAlgorithms.KeyEncapsulation
member.summary: Default key encapsulation algorithm: KAZ-KEM-256 (Security Level 5). This is the only KEM algorithm used for secure key exchange.

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.DefaultAlgorithms.SecurityLevel
member.summary: Security level for all cryptographic operations. Level 5 provides maximum quantum-resistant security (~AES-256 equivalent).

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm
member.summary: Represents the cryptographic algorithm for keys.

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm.MlDsa65
member.summary: ML-DSA-65 (FIPS 204) - Post-Quantum Digital Signature Algorithm. Security Level 3 (~AES-192 equivalent).

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm.MlDsa87
member.summary: ML-DSA-87 (FIPS 204) - Post-Quantum Digital Signature Algorithm. Security Level 5 (~AES-256 equivalent).

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm.MlKem768
member.summary: ML-KEM-768 (FIPS 203) - Post-Quantum Key Encapsulation Mechanism. Security Level 3 (~AES-192 equivalent).

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm.MlKem1024
member.summary: ML-KEM-1024 (FIPS 203) - Post-Quantum Key Encapsulation Mechanism. Security Level 5 (~AES-256 equivalent).

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm.KazSign128
member.summary: KAZ-SIGN-128 - Malaysian National Post-Quantum Signature Algorithm. Security Level 1 (comparable to ML-DSA-44).

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm.KazSign192
member.summary: KAZ-SIGN-192 - Malaysian National Post-Quantum Signature Algorithm. Security Level 3 (comparable to ML-DSA-65).

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm.KazSign256
member.summary: KAZ-SIGN-256 - Malaysian National Post-Quantum Signature Algorithm. Security Level 5 (comparable to ML-DSA-87).

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm.KazKem128
member.summary: KAZ-KEM-128 - Malaysian National Post-Quantum Key Encapsulation Mechanism. Security Level 1 (comparable to ML-KEM-512).

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm.KazKem192
member.summary: KAZ-KEM-192 - Malaysian National Post-Quantum Key Encapsulation Mechanism. Security Level 3 (comparable to ML-KEM-768).

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm.KazKem256
member.summary: KAZ-KEM-256 - Malaysian National Post-Quantum Key Encapsulation Mechanism. Security Level 5 (comparable to ML-KEM-1024).

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm.EcdsaP256
member.summary: ECDSA P-256 (Classical) - For hybrid signatures.

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm.EcdsaP384
member.summary: ECDSA P-384 (Classical) - For hybrid signatures.

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm.EcdhP256
member.summary: ECDH P-256 (Classical) - For hybrid key exchange.

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm.EcdhP384
member.summary: ECDH P-384 (Classical) - For hybrid key exchange.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyPurpose
member.summary: Represents the purpose of a cryptographic key.

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyPurpose.Signing
member.summary: Key is used for digital signatures.

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyPurpose.KeyEncapsulation
member.summary: Key is used for key encapsulation/exchange.

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyPurpose.DualUse
member.summary: Key is used for both signing and key encapsulation.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyStatus
member.summary: Represents the status of a cryptographic key.

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyStatus.Active
member.summary: Key is active and can be used.

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyStatus.Disabled
member.summary: Key is disabled (cannot be used but not destroyed).

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyStatus.Compromised
member.summary: Key is compromised and should not be trusted.

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyStatus.Destroyed
member.summary: Key has been securely destroyed.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyStorageType
member.summary: Represents where the key is stored.

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyStorageType.Software
member.summary: Key is stored in software (encrypted in database).

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyStorageType.Hsm
member.summary: Key is stored in HSM (PKCS#11).

member.name: F:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyStorageType.CloudKms
member.summary: Key is stored in cloud KMS.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.ICryptoKeyRepository
member.summary: Repository interface for CryptoKey aggregate.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.ICryptoProvider
member.summary: Interface for cryptographic operations provider.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.ICryptoProvider.GenerateKeyPairAsync(PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates a new key pair for the specified algorithm.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.ICryptoProvider.SignAsync(System.Byte[],System.Byte[],PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Signs data using the specified private key.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.ICryptoProvider.VerifyAsync(System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Byte[],PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Verifies a signature using the specified public key.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.ICryptoProvider.EncapsulateAsync(System.Byte[],PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Encapsulates a shared secret using the specified public key (KEM).

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.ICryptoProvider.DecapsulateAsync(System.Byte[],System.Byte[],PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Decapsulates a shared secret using the specified private key (KEM).

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.ICryptoProvider.ComputeFingerprint(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Computes the fingerprint of a public key.

member.name: P:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.ICryptoProvider.SupportedAlgorithms
member.summary: Gets the supported algorithms.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.KeyPairResult
member.summary: Result of key pair generation.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.KeyPairResult.#ctor(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Result of key pair generation.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.EncapsulationResult
member.summary: Result of key encapsulation.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.EncapsulationResult.#ctor(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Result of key encapsulation.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.IHsmProvider
member.summary: Interface for HSM (Hardware Security Module) operations via PKCS#11.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.IHsmProvider.GenerateKeyPairAsync(System.String,PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates a key pair in the HSM.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.IHsmProvider.SignAsync(System.String,System.Byte[],PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Signs data using a key stored in the HSM.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.IHsmProvider.VerifyAsync(System.String,System.Byte[],System.Byte[],PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Verifies a signature using a key stored in the HSM.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.IHsmProvider.EncapsulateAsync(System.String,PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Performs key encapsulation using a key stored in the HSM.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.IHsmProvider.DecapsulateAsync(System.String,System.Byte[],PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Performs key decapsulation using a key stored in the HSM.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.IHsmProvider.DestroyKeyAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Destroys a key in the HSM.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.IHsmProvider.KeyExistsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks if a key exists in the HSM.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.IHsmProvider.GetInfoAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets information about the HSM.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.HsmKeyResult
member.summary: Result of HSM key generation.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.HsmKeyResult.#ctor(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Result of HSM key generation.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.HsmInfo
member.summary: Information about the HSM.

member.name: M:PqcIdentity.Crypto.Domain.Interfaces.HsmInfo.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Information about the HSM.
